message:
Command `# OR at 99.2% CPU, 15.2% mem (1.2GB) - actively working on GRT re-run.
# This is normal for the GRT pass after antenna repair.
# Wait 10 more min then check again.
sleep 600

echo "=== $(date) ==="
ps -p 718885 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "LR alive" || echo "LR DONE"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | grep "^[0-9]" | head -10
ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/" 2>/dev/null && echo "GDS!" || echo "no GDS"
stat -c "size=%s mtime=%y" /tmp/librelane_final.log
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_final.log` executed with exit code -1.

function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "# OR at 99.2% CPU, 15.2% mem (1.2GB) - actively working on GRT re-run.
# This is normal for the GRT pass after antenna repair.
# Wait 10 more min then check again.
sleep 600

echo "=== $(date) ==="
ps -p 718885 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "LR alive" || echo "LR DONE"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | grep "^[0-9]" | head -10
ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/" 2>/dev/null && echo "GDS!" || echo "no GDS"
stat -c "size=%s mtime=%y" /tmp/librelane_final.log
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_final.log" timed out
